name: After New Endpoint
description: Checks that observability is wired after a new controller or service file is created

then.prompt: A new backend controller or service file was just created. Please verify it has proper observability: 1) MetricsService is injected and httpRequestsTotal is incremented, 2) Structured logs use the log() helper with correct levels (info/warn/error), 3) Error paths call Sentry.captureException(), 4) Swagger @ApiOperation decorator is present on controller methods. Run /check-obs on the new file if needed.
